ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather observation */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather observation */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the observation was made */,
  "weather_classifier" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather classifier */,
  "temp_category" INTEGER /* Reference to the temperature category */,
  "sunshine_type" INTEGER /* Reference to the sunshine type */,
  "precipitation_amount" REAL /* Amount of precipitation in millimeters */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity percentage */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hectopascals */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Start date of the valid period for this data */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* End date of the valid period for this data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_sunshine_type FOREIGN KEY ("sunshine_type") REFERENCES sunshine_types ("sunshine_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_weather_classifier FOREIGN KEY ("weather_classifier") REFERENCES weather_classifiers ("classifier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_temp_category FOREIGN KEY ("temp_category") REFERENCES temperature_categories ("temp_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "station_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "station_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station in meters */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for station contact */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for station contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_classifiers" (
  "classifier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather classifier */,
  "classifier_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather classifier (e.g., Mild Rain, Dry) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather classifier */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the weather classifier */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for visual representation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classifier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_categories" (
  "temp_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature category */,
  "temp_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the temperature category (e.g., None, Cool, Cold) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the temperature category */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature range */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature range */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon or image reference for visual representation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temp_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sunshine_types" (
  "sunshine_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sunshine type */,
  "sunshine_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sunshine type (e.g., Partially Overcast) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sunshine type */,
  "sunshine_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of sunshine */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon or image reference for visual representation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sunshine_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather observation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather observation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather observation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the device used */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Station, Satellite) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., Ground, Remote) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update from the data source */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
